[PDF_PAGE 241 | score=1] — The Isle of the Brutes An Excerpt from the History of the Knights of Takhisis Written and compiled by Ariakan, son of Ariakus, Commander Entry 103 It could be none other than my mother, Zeboim, goddess of the sea, who brought us to this island in the far reaches of the Courrain Ocean. Our charts, made by the minotaur, do not show land this far east of Ansalon. The storm that blew us off course has finally subsided after thirty-three days of furious rain and gale-force winds. Today was the first day of sun and calm since we viewed the shores of Ansalon. The island is very large, and we have not yet begun to search it.
